In [15]:
# =========================================================
# MONOTONIC XGBOOST FOR CREDIT DISTRESS
# =========================================================

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from xgboost import XGBClassifier
from sklearn.calibration import CalibratedClassifierCV
from sklearn.metrics import roc_auc_score, average_precision_score, brier_score_loss

# =========================================================
# 1. PREP DATA
# =========================================================
data = df.copy()

data["obs_date"] = pd.to_datetime(data["obs_date"], errors="coerce")
data["obs_year"] = data["obs_date"].dt.year
target = "distress_next_4q"

data = data.dropna(subset=[target, "obs_year"]).copy()
data[target] = data[target].astype(int)

# =========================================================
# 2. FEATURE SET
# Same V2 feature set
# =========================================================
base_features = [
    "bm", "npm", "gpm", "roa", "roe", "gprof",
    "invt_act", "rect_act", "curr_debt",
    "debt_capital", "de_ratio", "quick_ratio", "curr_ratio",
    "at_turn", "ret", "excess_ret", "vol", "shrout"
]

lag_change_features = [
    "roa_lag1", "roa_chg1",
    "roe_lag1", "roe_chg1",
    "npm_lag1", "npm_chg1",
    "gpm_lag1", "gpm_chg1",
    "de_ratio_lag1", "de_ratio_chg1",
    "quick_ratio_lag1", "quick_ratio_chg1",
    "curr_ratio_lag1", "curr_ratio_chg1"
]

base_features = [c for c in base_features if c in data.columns]
lag_change_features = [c for c in lag_change_features if c in data.columns]

features_mono = list(dict.fromkeys(base_features + lag_change_features))

print("Total features:", len(features_mono))
print(features_mono)

# =========================================================
# 3. TIME SPLIT
# =========================================================
train_df = data[(data["obs_year"] >= 2000) & (data["obs_year"] <= 2014)].copy()
calib_df = data[(data["obs_year"] >= 2015) & (data["obs_year"] <= 2018)].copy()
test_df  = data[(data["obs_year"] >= 2019) & (data["obs_year"] <= 2024)].copy()

X_train = train_df[features_mono]
y_train = train_df[target]

X_calib = calib_df[features_mono]
y_calib = calib_df[target]

X_test = test_df[features_mono]
y_test = test_df[target]

print("\nSplit summary")
print("Train:", X_train.shape, "Distress rate:", y_train.mean())
print("Calib:", X_calib.shape, "Distress rate:", y_calib.mean())
print("Test :", X_test.shape, "Distress rate:", y_test.mean())

# =========================================================
# 4. CLASS IMBALANCE
# =========================================================
n_negative = (y_train == 0).sum()
n_positive = (y_train == 1).sum()
scale_pos_weight = n_negative / max(n_positive, 1)

print("\nscale_pos_weight:", round(scale_pos_weight, 4))

# =========================================================
# 5. DEFINE MONOTONIC CONSTRAINTS
# +1 means risk should increase as variable increases
# -1 means risk should decrease as variable increases
#  0 means unconstrained
# =========================================================
constraint_map = {
    "debt_capital": 1,
    "de_ratio": 1,
    "quick_ratio": -1,
    "curr_ratio": -1,
    "roe": -1,
    "roa": -1,
    "npm": -1,

    # Optional dynamic signs
    "de_ratio_chg1": 1,
    "quick_ratio_chg1": -1,
    "curr_ratio_chg1": -1,
    "roe_chg1": -1,
    "roa_chg1": -1,
    "npm_chg1": -1
}

mono_constraints = [constraint_map.get(f, 0) for f in features_mono]
mono_constraints_str = "(" + ",".join(str(v) for v in mono_constraints) + ")"

print("\nMonotonic constraints string:")
print(mono_constraints_str)

# =========================================================
# 6. TRAIN MONOTONIC XGBOOST
# =========================================================
xgb_mono = XGBClassifier(
    objective="binary:logistic",
    eval_metric="logloss",
    random_state=42,
    n_jobs=-1,
    scale_pos_weight=scale_pos_weight,
    max_depth=4,
    learning_rate=0.03,
    n_estimators=400,
    min_child_weight=8,
    subsample=0.8,
    colsample_bytree=0.8,
    reg_lambda=1.0,
    monotone_constraints=mono_constraints_str
)

xgb_mono.fit(X_train, y_train)

p_mono_calib_raw = xgb_mono.predict_proba(X_calib)[:, 1]
p_mono_test_raw  = xgb_mono.predict_proba(X_test)[:, 1]

# =========================================================
# 7. CALIBRATE MONOTONIC XGBOOST
# =========================================================
xgb_mono_cal = CalibratedClassifierCV(
    estimator=xgb_mono,
    method="sigmoid",
    cv="prefit"
)

xgb_mono_cal.fit(X_calib, y_calib)

p_mono_calib = xgb_mono_cal.predict_proba(X_calib)[:, 1]
p_mono_test  = xgb_mono_cal.predict_proba(X_test)[:, 1]

# =========================================================
# 8. METRICS
# =========================================================
def evaluate(y_true, p):
    return {
        "roc_auc": roc_auc_score(y_true, p),
        "pr_auc": average_precision_score(y_true, p),
        "brier_score": brier_score_loss(y_true, p)
    }

def top_decile_capture(y_true, p):
    tmp = pd.DataFrame({"y": y_true.values, "p": p})
    tmp["decile"] = pd.qcut(tmp["p"], 10, labels=False, duplicates="drop") + 1
    top_decile = tmp["decile"].max()

    top_rate = tmp.loc[tmp["decile"] == top_decile, "y"].mean()
    distress_in_top = ((tmp["decile"] == top_decile) & (tmp["y"] == 1)).sum()
    total_distress = (tmp["y"] == 1).sum()
    capture_share = distress_in_top / max(total_distress, 1)

    return {
        "top_decile_realized_distress_rate": top_rate,
        "share_of_all_distress_in_top_decile": capture_share
    }

metrics_df = pd.DataFrame([
    {"split": "Calibration", "model": "Monotonic XGB Raw", **evaluate(y_calib, p_mono_calib_raw)},
    {"split": "Test", "model": "Monotonic XGB Raw", **evaluate(y_test, p_mono_test_raw)},
    {"split": "Calibration", "model": "Monotonic XGB Calibrated", **evaluate(y_calib, p_mono_calib)},
    {"split": "Test", "model": "Monotonic XGB Calibrated", **evaluate(y_test, p_mono_test)},
])

top_decile_df = pd.DataFrame([
    {"split": "Test", "model": "Monotonic XGB Raw", **top_decile_capture(y_test, p_mono_test_raw)},
    {"split": "Test", "model": "Monotonic XGB Calibrated", **top_decile_capture(y_test, p_mono_test)},
])

print("\nMONOTONIC XGBOOST RESULTS")
print(metrics_df)

print("\nTOP DECILE RESULTS")
print(top_decile_df)

# =========================================================
# 9. FEATURE IMPORTANCE
# =========================================================
importance_df = pd.DataFrame({
    "feature": features_mono,
    "importance": xgb_mono.feature_importances_
}).sort_values("importance", ascending=False)

print("\nTop feature importance")
print(importance_df.head(25))

# =========================================================
# 10. SAVE OUTPUTS
# =========================================================
output_dir = "/Users/nickythakurathi/Desktop/Dr. Ishita/Independent Study Dataset/"

metrics_df.to_csv(output_dir + "monotonic_xgb_metrics.csv", index=False)
top_decile_df.to_csv(output_dir + "monotonic_xgb_top_decile.csv", index=False)
importance_df.to_csv(output_dir + "monotonic_xgb_feature_importance.csv", index=False)

print("\nSaved:")
print(output_dir + "monotonic_xgb_metrics.csv")
print(output_dir + "monotonic_xgb_top_decile.csv")
print(output_dir + "monotonic_xgb_feature_importance.csv")

Total features: 32

In [16]:
# =========================================================
# SMALL RAG SYSTEM FOR CREDIT RISK QUERIES
# Query example: "what are the key risk factors?"
# =========================================================

import os
import re
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from collections import Counter

from xgboost import XGBClassifier
from sklearn.calibration import CalibratedClassifierCV
from sklearn.feature_extraction.text import TfidfVectorizer
from sklearn.metrics.pairwise import cosine_similarity

import shap

# =========================================================
# 1. PREP DATA
# =========================================================
data = df.copy()

data["obs_date"] = pd.to_datetime(data["obs_date"], errors="coerce")
data["obs_year"] = data["obs_date"].dt.year
target = "distress_next_4q"

data = data.dropna(subset=[target, "obs_year"]).copy()
data[target] = data[target].astype(int)

# =========================================================
# 2. FEATURES
# =========================================================
base_features = [
    "bm", "npm", "gpm", "roa", "roe", "gprof",
    "invt_act", "rect_act", "curr_debt",
    "debt_capital", "de_ratio", "quick_ratio", "curr_ratio",
    "at_turn", "ret", "excess_ret", "vol", "shrout"
]

lag_change_features = [
    "roa_lag1", "roa_chg1",
    "roe_lag1", "roe_chg1",
    "npm_lag1", "npm_chg1",
    "gpm_lag1", "gpm_chg1",
    "de_ratio_lag1", "de_ratio_chg1",
    "quick_ratio_lag1", "quick_ratio_chg1",
    "curr_ratio_lag1", "curr_ratio_chg1"
]

base_features = [c for c in base_features if c in data.columns]
lag_change_features = [c for c in lag_change_features if c in data.columns]
features_v2 = list(dict.fromkeys(base_features + lag_change_features))

# =========================================================
# 3. TIME SPLIT
# =========================================================
train_df = data[(data["obs_year"] >= 2000) & (data["obs_year"] <= 2014)].copy()
calib_df = data[(data["obs_year"] >= 2015) & (data["obs_year"] <= 2018)].copy()
test_df  = data[(data["obs_year"] >= 2019) & (data["obs_year"] <= 2024)].copy()

X_train = train_df[features_v2]
y_train = train_df[target]

X_calib = calib_df[features_v2]
y_calib = calib_df[target]

X_test = test_df[features_v2]
y_test = test_df[target]

# =========================================================
# 4. TRAIN XGBOOST V2 + CALIBRATION
# =========================================================
n_negative = (y_train == 0).sum()
n_positive = (y_train == 1).sum()
scale_pos_weight = n_negative / max(n_positive, 1)

xgb_v2 = XGBClassifier(
    objective="binary:logistic",
    eval_metric="logloss",
    random_state=42,
    n_jobs=-1,
    scale_pos_weight=scale_pos_weight,
    max_depth=4,
    learning_rate=0.03,
    n_estimators=400,
    min_child_weight=8,
    subsample=0.8,
    colsample_bytree=0.8,
    reg_lambda=1.0
)

xgb_v2.fit(X_train, y_train)

xgb_v2_calibrated = CalibratedClassifierCV(
    estimator=xgb_v2,
    method="sigmoid",
    cv="prefit"
)
xgb_v2_calibrated.fit(X_calib, y_calib)

p_test = xgb_v2_calibrated.predict_proba(X_test)[:, 1]

# =========================================================
# 5. SHAP VALUES
# =========================================================
explainer = shap.TreeExplainer(xgb_v2)
shap_values_test = explainer.shap_values(X_test)

if isinstance(shap_values_test, list):
    shap_values_test = shap_values_test[0]

# =========================================================
# 6. BUILD TEST RESULTS TABLE
# =========================================================
test_results = test_df[["permno", "obs_date", target]].copy().reset_index(drop=True)
X_test_reset = X_test.reset_index(drop=True)

test_results["pd_xgb_v2_calibrated"] = p_test
test_results["risk_decile_xgb_v2"] = pd.qcut(
    test_results["pd_xgb_v2_calibrated"],
    10,
    labels=False,
    duplicates="drop"
) + 1

for col in features_v2:
    test_results[col] = X_test_reset[col].values

# =========================================================
# 7. HELPER FUNCTIONS
# =========================================================
def fmt_num(x, digits=3):
    if pd.isna(x):
        return "missing"
    if isinstance(x, (int, np.integer)):
        return str(x)
    if isinstance(x, (float, np.floating)):
        return f"{x:.{digits}f}"
    return str(x)

def risk_bucket(pd_value):
    if pd_value >= 0.20:
        return "very high"
    elif pd_value >= 0.10:
        return "high"
    elif pd_value >= 0.05:
        return "moderate"
    else:
        return "low"

def top_shap_drivers_for_row(row_idx, feature_names, shap_values_matrix, top_n=5):
    vals = shap_values_matrix[row_idx]
    pairs = list(zip(feature_names, vals))
    pairs_sorted = sorted(pairs, key=lambda x: abs(x[1]), reverse=True)[:top_n]
    return pairs_sorted

# =========================================================
# 8. BUILD TEXT DOCUMENTS
# =========================================================
def make_document(row, row_idx):
    pd_value = row["pd_xgb_v2_calibrated"]
    bucket = risk_bucket(pd_value)

    selected_fields = [
        "roe", "npm", "roa", "gpm", "bm",
        "quick_ratio", "curr_ratio", "debt_capital",
        "ret", "excess_ret",
        "roe_chg1", "npm_chg1", "roa_chg1",
        "quick_ratio_chg1", "curr_ratio_chg1",
        "de_ratio_chg1"
    ]
    selected_fields = [c for c in selected_fields if c in row.index]

    field_text = [f"{c}={fmt_num(row[c])}" for c in selected_fields]

    drivers = top_shap_drivers_for_row(
        row_idx=row_idx,
        feature_names=features_v2,
        shap_values_matrix=shap_values_test,
        top_n=5
    )

    driver_text = []
    for feat, shap_val in drivers:
        direction = "increases" if shap_val > 0 else "reduces"
        driver_text.append(
            f"{feat} {direction} risk (shap={fmt_num(shap_val, 3)}, value={fmt_num(row[feat])})"
        )

    doc = (
        f"Firm quarter risk profile. "
        f"permno {row['permno']}. "
        f"date {pd.to_datetime(row['obs_date']).date()}. "
        f"predicted distress probability {fmt_num(pd_value, 4)}. "
        f"risk decile {row['risk_decile_xgb_v2']}. "
        f"risk bucket {bucket}. "
        f"actual future distress {int(row[target])}. "
        f"financial indicators: {'; '.join(field_text)}. "
        f"top drivers: {'; '.join(driver_text)}."
    )
    return doc

documents = []
for i in range(len(test_results)):
    merged_row = pd.concat([test_results.loc[i], X_test_reset.loc[i]])
    merged_row = merged_row[~merged_row.index.duplicated(keep="first")]
    documents.append(make_document(merged_row, i))

test_results["rag_text"] = documents

# =========================================================
# 9. BUILD TF-IDF RETRIEVER
# =========================================================
vectorizer = TfidfVectorizer(
    stop_words="english",
    ngram_range=(1, 2),
    min_df=2,
    max_features=5000
)

doc_matrix = vectorizer.fit_transform(test_results["rag_text"])

# =========================================================
# 10. RETRIEVAL
# =========================================================
def retrieve_cases(query, top_k=5, only_distressed=False, min_decile=None):
    pool = test_results.copy()

    if only_distressed:
        pool = pool[pool[target] == 1].copy()

    if min_decile is not None:
        pool = pool[pool["risk_decile_xgb_v2"] >= min_decile].copy()

    pool = pool.reset_index(drop=True)

    local_matrix = vectorizer.transform(pool["rag_text"])
    query_vec = vectorizer.transform([query])
    sims = cosine_similarity(query_vec, local_matrix).flatten()
    top_idx = np.argsort(-sims)[:top_k]

    out = pool.loc[top_idx, [
        "permno", "obs_date", target,
        "pd_xgb_v2_calibrated", "risk_decile_xgb_v2", "rag_text"
    ]].copy()

    out["similarity_score"] = sims[top_idx]
    out = out.sort_values("similarity_score", ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)
    return out

# =========================================================
# 11. SMALL ANALYST ANSWER FUNCTION
# =========================================================
def extract_driver_names(text):
    # pull feature names before " increases risk" or " reduces risk"
    patterns = re.findall(r"([A-Za-z0-9_]+)\s(?:increases|reduces)\srisk", text)
    return patterns

def answer_risk_query(query, top_k=5, only_distressed=False, min_decile=None):
    retrieved = retrieve_cases(
        query=query,
        top_k=top_k,
        only_distressed=only_distressed,
        min_decile=min_decile
    )

    all_drivers = []
    for txt in retrieved["rag_text"]:
        all_drivers.extend(extract_driver_names(txt))

    driver_counts = Counter(all_drivers)
    top_drivers = driver_counts.most_common(8)

    avg_pd = retrieved["pd_xgb_v2_calibrated"].mean()
    distress_rate = retrieved[target].mean()

    summary_lines = []
    summary_lines.append(f"Query: {query}")
    summary_lines.append(f"Retrieved {len(retrieved)} cases.")
    summary_lines.append(f"Average calibrated distress probability among retrieved cases: {avg_pd:.4f}")
    summary_lines.append(f"Actual distress rate among retrieved cases: {distress_rate:.4f}")

    if top_drivers:
        summary_lines.append("Most common retrieved risk drivers:")
        for feat, count in top_drivers:
            summary_lines.append(f"- {feat}: appeared in {count} retrieved cases")

    print("\n".join(summary_lines))
    return retrieved

# =========================================================
# 12. EXAMPLE QUERY
# =========================================================
print("\n================ EXAMPLE QUERY ================\n")
results_key_risk = answer_risk_query(
    query="what are the key risk factors",
    top_k=5,
    only_distressed=False,
    min_decile=8
)

print("\nTOP RETRIEVED CASES\n")
print(results_key_risk[[
    "permno", "obs_date", target,
    "pd_xgb_v2_calibrated", "risk_decile_xgb_v2", "similarity_score"
]])

# =========================================================
# 13. MORE EXAMPLES
# =========================================================
example_queries = [
    "what are the key risk factors",
    "high distress risk with weak liquidity and poor profitability",
    "worsening roe and npm with high distress risk",
    "negative excess returns and weak quick ratio",
    "common drivers of top decile distress"
]

for q in example_queries:
    print("\n==============================================")
    retrieved = answer_risk_query(q, top_k=5, only_distressed=False, min_decile=8)
    print(retrieved[[
        "permno", "obs_date", target,
        "pd_xgb_v2_calibrated", "risk_decile_xgb_v2", "similarity_score"
    ]])

# =========================================================
# 14. SAVE OUTPUTS
# =========================================================
output_dir = "/Users/nickythakurathi/Desktop/Dr. Ishita/Independent Study Dataset/"
os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)

test_results.to_csv(os.path.join(output_dir, "small_rag_test_documents.csv"), index=False)

print("\nSaved:")
print(os.path.join(output_dir, "small_rag_test_documents.csv"))
